message:
feat(combinator/race): add Cancel trait + Race3/Race4 result types

This expands the planned race! API surface without changing runtime semantics yet.

- Introduce `Cancel` (Future + cancel protocol hooks) so race participants can be cancelled explicitly.
- Add `PollingOrder` (Biased/Unbiased) to make polling policy an explicit, typed choice.
- Add `Race3`/`Race4` enums + `Race2` type alias and `winner_index()` helpers for uniform winner handling.
- Re-export new race types from `src/combinator/mod.rs`.
- Update `race!` macro docs to specify correct-by-design semantics (cancel + drain losers); macro body remains a placeholder until the runtime wiring is implemented.
